TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_u_dadiw_nu_Sakizaya_Sakizayaay_a_tademaw, title = u_dadiw_nu_Sakizaya_Sakizayaay_a_tademaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/u_dadiw_nu_Sakizaya_Sakizayaay_a_tademaw} }

S.FORM: u dadiw nu Sakizaya: Sakizayaay a tademaw misangaay tu dadiw: caykatineng tu misangaay tu sulit: caykatineng tu u balucu' nu misulitay : u Sakizaya a tademaw. u tatengaay a tademaw. caay katalaw ku cilal atu udad. talabuyu', tala sauwac, tala cuwacuwa limulak ku balucu', kapah ku demiad sananay. u sulit : u sakizaya hananay a tademaw. u sakizaya hananay a tademaw. u malukay tu dumiadmiad. caayay katalaw tu cilal atu udad. heyyuhu hayyan. heyyuhu hayyan. misadipit i bayu. mikalang i sauwac. limulak tu demiamiad. u dadiw nu Sakizaya: Sakizaya a tademaw u sakizaya hananay a tademaw. u sakizaya hananay a tademaw. u malukay tu dumiadmiad. caayay katalaw tu cilal atu udad. heyyuhu hayyan. heyyuhu hayyan. misadipit i bayu. mikalang i sauwac. limulak tu demiamiad.
S.PHON: u dadiw nu sakizaja: sakizajaaj a tad…ômaw misaŇčaaj tu dadiw: ¶ajkatin…ôŇč tu misaŇčaaj tu sur~…ĺit: ¶ajkatin…ôŇč tu u bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu misur~…ĺitaj : u sakizaja a tad…ômaw. u tat…ôŇčaaj a tad…ômaw. ¶aaj katar~…ĺaw ku ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ atu udad. tar~…ĺabuju Ē~ °, tar~…ĺa sauwa ¶, tar~…ĺa ¶uwa ¶uwa r~…ĺimur~…ĺak ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, kapańß ku d…ômiad sananaj. u sur~…ĺit : u sakizaja ńßananaj a tad…ômaw. u sakizaja ńßananaj a tad…ômaw. u mar~…ĺukaj tu dumiadmiad. ¶aajaj katar~…ĺaw tu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ atu udad. ńß…ôjuńßu ńßajjan. ńß…ôjuńßu ńßajjan. misadipit i baju. mikar~…ĺaŇč i sauwa ¶. r~…ĺimur~…ĺak tu d…ômiamiad. u dadiw nu sakizaja: sakizaja a tad…ômaw u sakizaja ńßananaj a tad…ômaw. u sakizaja ńßananaj a tad…ômaw. u mar~…ĺukaj tu dumiadmiad. ¶aajaj katar~…ĺaw tu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ atu udad. ńß…ôjuńßu ńßajjan. ńß…ôjuńßu ńßajjan. misadipit i baju. mikar~…ĺaŇč i sauwa ¶. r~…ĺimur~…ĺak tu d…ômiamiad.
S.FORM: u dadiw nu Sakizaya: Sakizayaay a tademaw misangaay tu dadiw: caykatineng tu misangaay tu sulit: caykatineng tu u balucu' nu misulitay : u Sakizaya a tademaw. u tatengaay a tademaw. caay katalaw ku cilal atu udad. talabuyu', tala sauwac, tala cuwacuwa limulak ku balucu', kapah ku demiad sananay. u sulit : u sakizaya hananay a tademaw. u sakizaya hananay a tademaw. u malukay tu dumiadmiad. caayay katalaw tu cilal atu udad. heyyuhu hayyan. heyyuhu hayyan. misadipit i bayu. mikalang i sauwac. limulak tu demiamiad. u dadiw nu Sakizaya: Sakizaya a tademaw u sakizaya hananay a tademaw. u sakizaya hananay a tademaw. u malukay tu dumiadmiad. caayay katalaw tu cilal atu udad. heyyuhu hayyan. heyyuhu hayyan. misadipit i bayu. mikalang i sauwac. limulak tu demiamiad.
S.PHON: u dadiw nu sakizaja: sakizajaaj a tad…ômaw misaŇčaaj tu dadiw: ¶ajkatin…ôŇč tu misaŇčaaj tu sur~…ĺit: ¶ajkatin…ôŇč tu u bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu misur~…ĺitaj : u sakizaja a tad…ômaw. u tat…ôŇčaaj a tad…ômaw. ¶aaj katar~…ĺaw ku ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ atu udad. tar~…ĺabuju Ē~ °, tar~…ĺa sauwa ¶, tar~…ĺa ¶uwa ¶uwa r~…ĺimur~…ĺak ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, kapańß ku d…ômiad sananaj. u sur~…ĺit : u sakizaja ńßananaj a tad…ômaw. u sakizaja ńßananaj a tad…ômaw. u mar~…ĺukaj tu dumiadmiad. ¶aajaj katar~…ĺaw tu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ atu udad. ńß…ôjuńßu ńßajjan. ńß…ôjuńßu ńßajjan. misadipit i baju. mikar~…ĺaŇč i sauwa ¶. r~…ĺimur~…ĺak tu d…ômiamiad. u dadiw nu sakizaja: sakizaja a tad…ômaw u sakizaja ńßananaj a tad…ômaw. u sakizaja ńßananaj a tad…ômaw. u mar~…ĺukaj tu dumiadmiad. ¶aajaj katar~…ĺaw tu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ atu udad. ńß…ôjuńßu ńßajjan. ńß…ôjuńßu ńßajjan. misadipit i baju. mikar~…ĺaŇč i sauwa ¶. r~…ĺimur~…ĺak tu d…ômiamiad.
